title: UC San Diego Partners with Innovative Genomics Institute on the Next Generation of Genome Editing
snippet: The University of California San Diego and the Innovative Genomics Institute (IGI) announced a new partnership to jointly develop cutting-edge genomic tools. UC San Diego Chancellor Pradeep Khosla highlighted the power of collaboration across the UC system to tackle challenges in human health.
match_reason: websearch (blog_post) — Pradeep K. Khosla is the Chancellor of UC San Diego and is quoted in this official announcement of a major genomics and AI/ML research partnership.

title: The Robot Future - Ken Goldberg
snippet: Ken Goldberg is a popular public speaker on AI and robotics, an award-winning roboticist, filmmaker, and artist, and the William S. Floyd Distinguished Chair in Engineering at UC Berkeley. In this talk, he discusses the future of robotics, physical intelligence, and how robots connect with AI.
match_reason: social (video) — Ken Goldberg is the featured speaker in this video discussing the future of robotics and AI.
